pageCaption.value: South America’s table-top mountains conceal caves never visited by humans. Italian scientist and explorer Francesco Sauro is taking on the daunting challenge of exploring these caves in a quest for clues to the evolution of life and the planet.

metadescription.value: South America’s table-top mountains conceal caves never visited by humans. Italian scientist and explorer Francesco Sauro is taking on the daunting challenge of exploring these caves in a quest for clues to the evolution of life and the planet.

pageTitle.value: Rolex and Mission Blue - Malpelo Island Hope Spot - Episode 2

pageCaption.value: Naturalist and professional diver Sandra Bessudo has worked for decades to conserve marine life around Malpelo Island, off the coast of Colombia.

WaPageTitle.value: Rolex and Mission Blue - Malpelo Island Hope Spot - Episode 2

metadescription.value: As the Malpelo Island Hope Spot Champion, diver Sandra Bessudo leads expeditions to monitor the region twice a year. Watch the video on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: Mission Blue: Malpelo Island Hope Spot - Episode 2

pageCaption.value: Hunters and fishermen almost eradicated Atlantic puffins from Maine’s offshore islands in the 19th century. The innovative techniques that 1987 Rolex Laureate Stephen W. Kress used to bring them back have inspired major changes in seabird conservation.

metadescription.value: Hunters and fishermen almost eradicated Atlantic puffins from Maine’s offshore islands in the 19th century. The innovative techniques that 1987 Rolex Laureate Stephen W. Kress used to bring them back have inspired major changes in seabird conservation.

pageTitle.value: Rolex Awards for Enterprise - Latest Laureates - Video

pageCaption.value: As part of its Perpetual Planet Initiative, Rolex is pleased to announce the new Laureates of the Rolex Awards for Enterprise.

metadescription.value: Discover the 2023 Rolex Awards Laureates, five pioneers striving towards a perpetual planet through ambitious projects. Watch the video on rolex.org.

pageTitle.value: Saving Rwanda’s bird of fortune - Video

pageCaption.value: Rwanda’s iconic grey crowned-crane is disappearing because of poaching and loss of habitat. Olivier Nsengimana is liberating cranes from gardens, while inspiring a new generation of conservationists to value his country’s extraordinary wildlife.Discover more about Rolex Awards Young Laureate Olivier Nsengimana

pageCaption.value: Superbugs, resistant to antibiotics, are a threat to humanity. Saudi Arabian microbiologist Hosam Zowawi is combating the misuse of antibiotics by developing groundbreaking diagnostic tests and an awareness campaign in the Gulf states.

pageCaption.value: Scottish biologist Karina Atkinson is fostering research and responsible tourism to save a Paraguayan reserve.
